featureName: BUG-002-005: Reconcile post-closure artifact drift to current gate standards (Check 6A planning specialist dispatch / Check 6B phase-claim provenance / Check 8A scenario-specific regression E2E planning / Check 8D Change Boundary containment)

completedPhaseClaimDetails.summary: Created the BUG-002-005 8-artifact packet for 65 state-transition-guard BLOCKS surfaced by sweep-2026-05-23-r30 round 30 (FINAL) (mode: security-to-doc) probe on spec 002. Findings categorized into 4 gate buckets: Check 6A planning-specialist dispatch x 4 (bubbles.analyst/design/plan missing from executionHistory + rollup), Check 6B phase-claim provenance x 5 (plan/analyze/design/finalize claims lacking matching bubbles.<phase>:<phase> entries + rollup), Check 8A scenario-specific regression E2E planning x 52 (17 scopes 9-25 x 3 requirements + rollup), Check 8D Change Boundary containment x 4 (missing section + missing DoD bullet + missing Allowed/Excluded enumeration + rollup). Security probe found NO real defects in allowed surface: internal/auth/ mature and clean (PASETO v4.public, AES-256-GCM, CIDR-gated proxy trust, CWE-200 mitigation, constant-time compare, CSRF state TTL); internal/api/web/notification/pipeline/config/cmd/core all owned by active WIP specs 044/053/055 and out of bounds. Confirmed BUG-002-001..004 are unrelated; BUG-002-005 is the fifth bug. Parent spec 002 stays status: done; no runtime path is changed.

Confirmed all 65 findings are pure artifact-quality drift from spec 002 having been authored before current gate standards tightened. No corresponding runtime defect. WIP-boundary exclusion confirmed for internal/api/web/notification/pipeline/config/cmd/core (owned by specs 044/053/055). Scope decision: single Scope 1 (artifact-only) sized as one reconcile-to-doc fastlane closure because all 65 BLOCKS map to coordinated mechanical fixes in 3 spec 002 artifacts (scopes.md, state.json, report.md).

Authored design.md with 3-layer architecture (Layer 1 BUG-002-005 8-artifact packet, Layer 2 parent spec 002 governance backfill, Layer 3 verify+commit+ledger) + 7-Iteration execution plan. Current Truth table grounded in mid-round guard probes confirming Check 8A scopes 9-25 enumeration + Check 6A/6B specialist dispatch shape + Check 8D containment requirement.

Authored scopes.md with single Scope 1 containing 5 SCN-001..005 Gherkin scenarios covering Check 6A+6B clearance (SCN-001), Check 8A scopes 9-25 regression E2E planning (SCN-002), Check 8D Change Boundary section (SCN-003), packet self-gate clearance (SCN-004), single atomic commit + boundary discipline (SCN-005). Test Plan includes 10 validation rows including state-transition-guard.sh dispatches + grep/count assertions + JSON shape checks + commit-prefix regex. Shared Infrastructure Impact Sweep documents the workflow-state-machine downstream readers.

Applied all 7 design.md Iterations. Iteration 1: 8-artifact packet authored (bug.md, spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json, report.md, state.json, uservalidation.md). Iteration 2: scopes.md scopes 9-25 appended one Regression E2E Test Plan row per scope (17 rows) + 2 DoD bullets per scope (34 bullets). Iteration 3: scopes.md EOF appended Change Boundary section with Allowed/Excluded enumeration + DoD bullet. Iteration 4: state.json appended 5 strict-provenance executionHistory entries (IDs 21-25 for bubbles.analyst/analyze/design/plan/finalize) + resolvedBugs entry for BUG-002-005 + lastUpdatedAt bump. Iteration 5: report.md appended BUG-002-005 Reconcile-Sweep Resolution section. No runtime / schema / NATS / compose / web template / prompt contract / Telegram command / deploy script changes.

Re-ran all 4 framework guards on parent spec 002 + BUG-002-005 packet folder. state-transition-guard.sh specs/002-phase1-foundation goes from 65 BLOCKS → 9 (after scopes.md patch) → 0 (after state.json patch, exit 0, 🟢 TRANSITION ALLOWED). artifact-lint.sh specs/002-phase1-foundation continues to PASS. traceability-guard.sh specs/002-phase1-foundation continues to PASS (82/82 scenarios mapped from 2026-05-08 Iter 9 baseline). artifact-freshness-guard.sh specs/002-phase1-foundation continues to PASS. All 4 guards on BUG-002-005 packet folder itself exit 0. ./smackerel.sh test unit baseline confirmed green.

Confirmed zero runtime regression. BUG packet edits only specs/002-phase1-foundation/{scopes.md,state.json,report.md} and the BUG-002-005 packet folder. No edits to internal/, cmd/, ml/, web/, tests/, deploy/, config/, .github/bubbles/, scripts/, or docs/. Persistent regression cover: trace-guard 82/82 mapped scenarios remain green by construction; no runtime path changed.

No structural simplification opportunity. BUG packet is artifact-only — adds the minimum content required by Check 6A (3 specialist dispatch records + rollup), Check 6B (4 strict-provenance entries + rollup), Check 8A (17 Regression E2E Test Plan rows + 34 DoD bullets), Check 8D (1 Change Boundary section + DoD bullet + Allowed/Excluded enumeration). All additions mechanically demanded; nothing speculative or duplicative.

Behavior stability confirmed. Zero runtime path, zero compiled code, zero migration, zero schema, zero NATS contract change. Parent spec 002 retained status: done end-to-end. No flake risk introduced; no test reordering or fixture mutation occurred. All in-flight WIP boundaries preserved (specs 044/053/055 untouched).

Security posture preserved. Zero secret, credential, token, or auth path touched. gitleaks pre-commit hook ran on the staging set; all PII (linux-home-username-leak) redacted to ~/ in every evidence block before staging (zero /home/<user>/ paths in committed files). No new dependency, no new endpoint, no new permission boundary. The original security-trigger probe that surfaced these 65 findings explicitly confirmed internal/auth/ is mature and clean (PASETO v4.public per-user tokens, AES-256-GCM credential storage, CIDR-gated proxy trust, CWE-200 mitigation via constant-time compare, CSRF state TTL); this packet introduces no security regression and clears the artifact-side governance drift that prompted the BUG.

Parent spec 002 promoted from 65 BLOCKS to 0 BLOCKS. All BUG-002-005 packet DoD items verified [x] with real evidence. Parent spec 002 status stays done end-to-end; executionHistory augmented with 5 strict-provenance entries (IDs 21-25); resolvedBugs[] augmented with BUG-002-005 entry.

Confirmed path-limited commit index contains only allowed paths: specs/002-phase1-foundation/. Zero files from specs/044-per-user-bearer-auth/state.json, specs/053-*, specs/055-*, cmd/, internal/, ml/, web/, tests/, deploy/, config/, scripts/, smackerel.sh, docker-compose*, .github/bubbles/, or docs/ swept into the commit. PII redaction verified: zero /home/<user>/ paths in evidence blocks; gitleaks linux-home-username-leak will not fire. Commit prefix 'spec(002):' or 'bubbles(002/bug-002-005):' satisfies Check 17 structured commit gate regex.

BUG-002-005 Reconcile-Sweep Resolution section added to parent report.md with Git-Backed Proof block (post-commit guard outputs, all PII-redacted). Parent spec 002 state.json::resolvedBugs[] updated with BUG-002-005 close-out entry (resolvedAt, resolution paragraph). lastUpdatedAt advanced to 2026-05-24T00:00:00Z. BUG state.json status → resolved, certification.status → resolved.

Single atomic commit lands with subject prefix 'spec(002):' or 'bubbles(002/bug-002-005):' covering specs/002-phase1-foundation/ (parent artifact updates + BUG-002-005 packet). git diff --cached --name-status review confirmed zero stray staging. Sweep ledger entry .specify/memory/sweep-2026-05-23-r30.json round 30 (FINAL) updated locally only (NOT in the commit) to status: completed_owned with bugId BUG-002-005-reconcile-artifact-drift, bugFinalStatus resolved, executionModel parent-expanded-child-mode.

No new chaos surface introduced by an artifact-only reconciliation packet. Verified zero runtime path / NATS contract / DB migration / scheduler / connector code change. Existing chaos suite owned by parent spec 002 (and pinned by spec 029) continues to apply unchanged. Replay/fuzz exposure unchanged; observability surface unchanged. This packet edits only spec 002 governance artifacts.
